---
title: "Notes"
listing:
  id: notes-list
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
page-layout: full
toc: false
comments: false
citation: false
---

Short-form research notes, reading logs, and work-in-progress observations.

::: {#notes-list}
:::
